bas-banana-bread.name: Ba's Banana Bread

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, or sour cream

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Lightly coat an 8½x4½" loaf pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray and line with parchment paper, leaving generous overhang on long sides. Whisk 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1¼ tsp. baking soda, and ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl to combine.

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat 1 cup (200 g; packed) dark brown sugar, ⅓ cup mascarpone, plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, or sour cream, and 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Add 2 large eggs, one at a time, beating to blend after each addition and scraping down sides and bottom of bowl with a rubber spatula as needed.

Reduce speed to low, add dry ingredients, and mix until just combined. Add 4 large very ripe bananas, peeled, mashed (about 1½ cups), and mix until just combined. Fold in ½ cup chopped bittersweet or semisweet chocolate and/or ½ cup chopped raw walnuts if using with spatula. Scrape batter into prepared loaf pan; smooth top.

Bake bread until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 60–65 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let bread cool in pan 1 hour. Turn out bread onto rack and let cool completely (if you can resist) before slicing.


Editor’s note: This recipe was first published in December 2021. Head this way for more of our best banana recipes →

babas-sorrel-soup.name: Baba's Sorrel Soup
instructions: Melt butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook and stir until soft, about 5 minutes. Add sorrel, in batches, stirring until wilted, 5 to 8 minutes.
Add chicken stock and water to the Dutch oven; stir in potatoes, carrot, parsley, dill, lemon juice, black pepper, and cayenne pepper. Simmer until flavors combine, about 1 hour.
Purée soup with an immersion blender until mostly smooth.

baby-turnip-confit.name: Baby Turnip Confit
instructions: Heat thyme, garlic, bay leaves, and duck fat in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, reduce heat to medium, and cook gently 15 minutes.

Toss turnips with 2 tsp. salt in a medium bowl. Add turnips to duck fat, increase heat to medium-high, and cook until turnips are tender, 20–25 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer turnips to a platter; season with salt and pepper.
Strain duck fat through a fine-mesh sieve into a large heatproof jar or airtight container.

Heat 2 Tbsp. duck fat in a skillet over medium-high heat (reserve remaining duck fat for another use; let cool, then cover and chill). Add turnip greens; season with salt and pepper and cook, tossing often, until wilted and tender, about 5 minutes. Add turnips and toss to coat. Serve drizzled with lemon juice and topped with chives.

baharat-chicken-tenders.name: Baharat Chicken Tenders
instructions: Combine sweet paprika, pepper, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, cloves, cardamom, star anise, and nutmeg in a small bowl and stir to combine.

Place chicken tenders on a plate and sprinkle one side with 2 teaspoons of the spice blend. Season with sea salt to taste. Turn tenders and sprinkle the other side with an additional 2 teaspoons of the spice blend; add salt to taste. Store remaining spice blend in an airtight container and reserve for another use.

Heat a skillet over medium heat. Pour in olive oil once skillet is hot and heat until it shimmers. Carefully place chicken tenders into skillet one at a time, making sure they don't touch each other. Cook for 4 1/2 minutes, turn, and cook until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 4 1/2 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C). Remove chicken from skillet and drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
Add onion to the same skillet and cook until soft and translucent, about 4 minutes. Remove onion slices and drain on paper towel-lined plate. Serve onions with chicken.

baked-cauliflower-dish-lezzet.name: Baked Cauliflower Dish
instructions: 1. Celebrate the mink parts divide andush salty water to stay light.
2. Finely chop yellow peppers with tomatoes.
3. Sauce peppers and tomatoes with olive oil in a pan for 3 minutes.
4. Add and shoot 5 minutes more.
5. Taste salt and pepper.
6. Transfer the meal into the lubricated oven container.
7. Bake for 15 minutes in oven with a heated 180 degree.
8. Bake the cheese grated in the car and cook for 5 minutes.
9. In the oven, you can serve with pepperberry, lazania.
10. No matter.

baked-salmon-with-lemon-pequerecetas.name: Baked Salmon With Lemon

ingredients.item: Fresh herbs or some lemon juice to serve (optional)
1 cucharadita de romero seco o 1 ramita de romero fresco

instructions: We purify the oven at 180 been 3 been (heat up and down). We squeezed the lemon and shredded the skin. In a bowl we mix 3 tablespoons of honey, 3 tablespoons of olive oil, 2 chopped garlic, lemon juice and pounding. Let's have a good time.
We cut salmon into pieces of similar size. We put them in a bowl and cover them with the marinade and make sure they are well impregnated. We let about 20 minutes go while we prepare the potatoes.

Lavamos las patatas baby, las secamos y las cortamos por la mitad a lo largo. Mezclamos las patatas y los gajos de cebolla en un bol grande con 1 cucharada de aceite de oliva, 1 ajo picado, el romero, sal y pimienta.
We put potatoes and onion into a large oven-suitable fountain. We baked for about 30 minutes, till the potatoes are nearly made, stirring from time to time to cook them evenly.

We distribute marinated salmon onto potatoes and onion. We added some of the marinade above and re-put the fountain into the oven. We baked about 15 more minutes, till the salmon's tender and the golden potatoes. Optional, a slice of lemon can be placed on each back to step up the citrus touch.
We serve salmon with potatoes and onion directly from the fountain. Optional, we decorate with fresh herbs or a chorrit of lemon juice.

baked-shrimp-recipe-comedera.name: Baked Shrimp Recipe

ingredients.item: Sal (de preferencia sal gruesa o gorda)

instructions: Comenzaremos por precalentar el horno a 180 grados.
Luego, haremos un condimento para hidratar y dar mucho sabor a las gambas, antes de meterlas al horno. De entrada, pelaremos los dientes de ajo.
En el caso del perejil, lo lavaremos bien, lo escurriremos, y picaremos finamente las hojas. Lo ideal es completar al menos media taza de perejil picado.
Then we'll get a mortar and place the garlic and parsley there. We'll soon get the lemon and add the juice to the mix.
We will also add an olive oil chorrit, a touch of salt and a touch of pepper.

We will master all the ingredients up to a more or less uniform dough (especially with no big pieces of garlic). Then we'll try the mojo, to be sure to correct the time, if necessary. It's normal that the condiment has a strong taste, and that will be balanced once we combine its taste with the soft flesh of the shrimp.
Now we'll distribute the clear prawns onto an oven-suitable plate or bowl, making sure they don't overlap, so they'll cook them evenly.

With the help of a cooking brush, distribute well the condiment to cover fully each guba (it's vital that they are well covered so that they stay hydrated while they are baked). If you have some more, you can put them at the end above.
Enviaremos las gambas al horno para que se cocinen durante 10 minutos.
Una vez pasado este tiempo, saca las gambas del horno y sirve inmediatamente.

baked-shrimp-scampi-linguine-pasta.name: Baked Shrimp Scampi Linguine Pasta
instructions: Preheat oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
In a medium-sized casserole pan, combine shrimp, salt, pepper, red chili flakes, garlic, butter, lemon juice, and white wine.
Bake for 10-13 minutes, or until shrimp turns pink and is fully cooked.
Bring 4 quarts of water to a boil, add salt to taste, and cook linguine pasta al dente according to package directions, stirring occasionally.
Strain linguine and combine with shrimp until pasta is fully coated in white wine scampi sauce.
Garnish with chopped Italian parsley.
Enjoy!

baked-spiced-cake-donuts.name: Baked Spiced Cake Donuts
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 12-cup muffin pan with baking spray.
Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, pumpkin pie spice, and kosher salt in a large bowl.

Whisk together applesauce, apple cider, egg, melted butter, and vanilla in a medium bowl until well combined. Stir into flour mixture gradually until ingredients are combined. Spoon batter into the prepared pan, filling each cup 3/4 full.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of a donut comes out clean, about 17 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before removing donuts from the pan.
Make topping: Stir together sugar and cinnamon in a shallow dish until well combined. Brush melted butter on both sides of donuts, then dip into sugar-cinnamon mixture to evenly coat.

baked-spinach-with-eggs-teleculinaria.name: Baked Spinach With Eggs
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180°C. In a frying pan, skip the spinach in olive oil for about 2 to 3 minutes until it softens a little. Add half the garlic cloves well chopped so that they cook only slightly. Season with salt and pepper.
Divide the spinach into six small refractory bowls. In each of the bowls open an entire egg. Water with cream and grate over a little parmesan cheese.
Finally, season with salt and pepper and oven for about 10 to 15 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to taste. Remove and serve immediately.

baked-stuffed-buns-argiro.name: Baked Stuffed Buns
instructions: As we intend to fill the fish, we do not teach them into the belly at all, but clear them from the gills, pressing them into the body.
Then pour a lot of water into their belly to rinse them out well.
Put them in a colander and salt them.
Mix the filling materials in a bowl until we have a homogeneous paste.
Fill with the mixture the fish from the openings that left the gills, pressing it to fill the belly of each fish. Leave them in the refrigerator for a while.
Add the onions, marathoriza, parsley, pelte, grated tomato, lemon juice, raisin, olive oil and some salt and pepper to a small baking pan.
Bake the mixture in a preheated oven, at 200°C, in the air, in the medium grill, for 20 minutes.
Place the stuffed fish on the cooked vegetarians, sprinkle them with some olive oil and continue baking for 15 minutes.
Set them asside for 5 minutes in an ocean and serve the fish with their sauce while they are warm, accompaniing them with lemon quarters.

banana-cookie-milkshake-argiro.name: Banana Cookie Milkshake

ingredients.item: A few mini biscuits Stuffed for serving
A few mini biscuits Stuffed for serving

instructions: Place vanilla ice cream, milk, biscuits and banana in the blender. We grind them in the blender for a few seconds until it becomes smooth for the milkshake.
Balance in 2 glasses. Garnish with mini biscuits Stuffed.
Make the ultimate homemade milkshake with the easy vanilla ice cream I have here, or experience with any other flavor of ice cream you like.
If you make homemade ice cream, don't target to read all my advice and secrets to make it perfect,even without an ice cream machine.

banh-mi-meatball-sandwich.name: Banh Mi Meatball Sandwich
instructions: Combine the pickled carrot and daikon ingredients in a mixing bowl. Set aside and let them pickle for at least an hour.
Combine all of the banh mi meatball ingredients in a large mixing bowl. Form ping pong sized meatballs. Pan fry until browned on all sides and cooked all the way through.
Put together the sandwich. Smear a layer of Sriracha mayo on one half of the baguette, add the meats, a few of the pickled carrots and daikon and some fresh cilantro. Top with other half of baguette.
Enjoy!

barley-recipe-with-pumpkin-and-parmesan-.name: Barley Recipe With Pumpkin And Parmesan Cheese
barley-recipe-with-pumpkin-and-parmesan-.original_name: Receta de cebada con calabaza y queso parmesano

ingredients.item: 1 taza de calabaza cortada en cubos
Hojas de albahaca fresca o perejil para decorar  ((opcional))

instructions: In a large pot, add barley with 2 cups of vegetable stock. It leads to boiling, reduces fire and cooks with low heat for about 25-30 minutes, or till barley is soft but still firm. Drain the excess of fluid if necessary.

While cooking the barley, heat up a large frying pan with a tablespoon of olive oil. Add onion and garlic and damper with medium heat till golden and fringes about 5 minutes. Then add pumpkin and cook cubes for 10-12 minutes or till they are tender but still maintain their shape.

Once the barley is cooked, add to the frying pan with pumpkin. It incorporates parmesan cheese and the other tablespoon of olive oil. Mix well till all ingredients are well integrated. Reaping the salt and pepper point to taste.
Sirve caliente, decorado con albahaca fresca o perejil si lo deseas.

basically-skillet-lasagna.name: Basically Skillet Lasagna
instructions: Place a rack in top-third of oven; preheat to 425°. Bring a large pot of generously salted water to a boil.
Meanwhile, get some prep work out of the way. Peel 1 large onion, then finely chop. Set aside on cutting board. Crush 6 garlic cloves with the side of a chef’s knife, then peel and coarsely chop.
Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin oil in a 12" ovenproof skillet over medium. Cook onion and garlic, stirring occasionally, until onion is beginning to brown and soften, about 5 minutes.

Add 3 14.5-oz. cans crushed tomatoes, 1 tsp. dried oregano, ¾ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes, 3 whole basil sprigs, and 1 tsp. salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is reduced and slightly thickened and flavors have melded, about 15 minutes. Remove from heat and pluck out basil sprigs.

Meanwhile, place 20 oz. thawed spinach on a large clean kitchen towel and wring it out over the sink until no more water can be squeezed out. If you don't have any clean kitchen towels, you can also squeeze water out of the spinach by hand one small handful at a time, or press it in a fine-mesh sieve. Whatever you do, just don't skip this step—waterlogged spinach will make the finished dish too soupy.
Mix spinach, 2 cups ricotta, 1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper, 3 oz. grated Parmesan, and remaining 1 tsp. salt in a medium bowl to combine.

Cook 10 oz. lasagna noodles in boiling salted water, stirring occasionally and separating with a spatula to keep them from sticking, 4 minutes (they'll be very al dente at this point, but will finish cooking in oven). Drain noodles and leave in colander until ready to assemble.
Using a ladle, transfer 3 cups sauce to a medium bowl, leaving just a thin layer of sauce behind. Spread to coat bottom of pan.

Arrange noodles in a single layer over sauce in pan, breaking up a few sheets to fit and cover the whole surface. Top noodles with one-third of tomato sauce, spreading evenly with a spatula. Using a spoon, dollop half of the ricotta mixture in small mounds all over sauce. Sprinkle one-third of shredded mozzarella over ricotta mixture.

Repeat layering noodles, one-third of sauce, remaining ricotta mixture, and one-third of mozzarella one more time.  Top mozzarella with another layer of noodles. Spoon any remaining sauce over, then top with remaining mozzarella.
Bake lasagna until browned and bubbling, 15–20 minutes. Sprinkle some Parmesan over, then garnish with remaining basil leaves.

basque-cheesecake-recipe-step-by-step-co.name: Basque Cheesecake Recipe Step By Step
basque-cheesecake-recipe-step-by-step-co.original_name: Tarta de queso vasca receta paso a paso
instructions: In a large bowl add the cream cheese with the eggs and mix gently while preventing them from forming clumps.
Add the sugar and continue to mix.
Agrega una cucharada y media de harina y mezcla. Incorpora la nata.
It purifies the oven at 200ºC.
Gently mix up and get a smooth blend.
Cubre un molde desmoldable grande con papel sulfurizado o papel vegetal para horno.
Enter the oven at 210ºC for 45 minutes at medium height.
Vigila a partir de los 30 minutos, hasta que la superficie quede ligeramente tostada.
After that time, get the cheesecake out of the oven and leave 3-4 hours till it gets cold before crumbling.
Once cold it will be easy to demold. Just remove the mold and carefully take off the paper of the cake.

bbq-chicken-breasts-in-the-oven.name: Bbq Chicken Breasts In The Oven

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and coarsely ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking pan with heavy-duty foil to make cleanup easier.
Prepare chicken breasts by cutting off the rib meat if you wish; leave the skin on. Season chicken with salt and pepper and put in the pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until juices start to appear, about 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Remove the pan and generously pour 1/2 of the barbecue sauce over chicken. Continue to bake for 20 minutes. Repeat with remaining barbecue sauce.
Cook until no longer pink in the centers and skin is crispy, 15 to 20 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Serve hot and enjoy!

bbq-pulled-pork-kettle-chip-nachos.name: Bbq Pulled Pork Kettle Chip Nachos

ingredients.item: Kroger® kettle cooked original potato chips
Kroger® kettle cooked mesquite bbq potato chips

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C).
In a medium bowl, combine the Kroger® Hardwood Smoked Pulled Pork and 1 18-ounce bottle of barbecue sauce, and mix well.

Add ⅓ of the Kroger® Kettle Cooked Original Potato Chips and ⅓ of the Kroger® Kettle Cooked Mesquite BBQ Potato Chips to a 12” cast-iron skillet. Distribute ⅓ of the pulled pork mixture over the chips. Drizzle about 2 tablespoons of the remaining barbecue sauce over the chips and sprinkle with ½ cup of the Kroger® Shredded Sharp Cheddar Cheese. Repeat with the remaining chips, pork mixture, barbecue sauce, and cheese to make 2 more layers, finishing with the rest of the cheese. Drizzle more barbecue sauce on top.
Bake the nachos for 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and garnish with the green onions and dollops of sour cream.
Enjoy!

beef-and-kale-tacos.name: Beef And Kale Tacos

ingredients.item: Kale leaves sliced into thin strips
Shredded cheddar or pepper jack cheese

instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C.

Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the olive oil, then add the beef, carrots, and garlic. Sprinkle with the salt. Cook for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until meat begins to brown and the vegetables soften. Add the chili powder, cumin, and tomato paste. Cook for an additional 1 to 2 minutes, until the spices become fragrant. Add the water, reduce the heat, and simmer for 4 to 5 minutes, until the beef is no longer pink in the center.

Meanwhile, place the taco shells in the oven for 5 to 10 minutes to warm them (or warm them in the toaster oven). Assemble each taco by spooning in 2 tablespoons of the meat and some of the kale and cheese into each shell. Top each taco with 1 teaspoon salsa and serve immediately.

beef-shawarma-fries.name: Beef Shawarma Fries
instructions: Cut the steak into thin slices, about 3 inches in length. Add the spices, tahini and yogurt and mix. Cover and marinate in the fridge for at least 30 minutes.
Mix the yogurt, tahini, salt, lemon and water to make the sauce. Set aside.
Once it's time to cook the meat, start frying your potatoes. Cook the steak for 8- minutes with 2 tbsp of oil on medium high.
For layering, add your fries, beef, sumac rubbed onions, turnips and then sauce.
Serve and enjoy!

beef-stew-with-potatoes-recipe-comedera.name: Beef Stew With Potatoes Recipe
beef-stew-with-potatoes-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta estofado de ternera con patatas

ingredients.item: 500 gr de carne de ternera para guisar picada en cubos
1 cucharadita de pasta de tomate concentrado

instructions: Pela y corta las zanahorias y las patatas en trozos medianos.
Cut onion, pepper, tomato and garlic teeth into small cubes.
It heats up a large pot with a generous jet of olive oil and pits onion and garlic till clear (care will burn your garlic). Add the pepper and then cut tomato. Let's cook a few minutes.
Ahora vas a incorporar la carne de ternera. Deja que se dore un poco por todas sus caras.
Add the spices: oregano, salt and pepper.
Do some digging. The veal should have put some of his juices out by now.
Add 3 cups of broth. Ideally, meat and other ingredients are completely submerged into the liquid.
Echa la cucharadita de pasta de tomate concentrado. Revuelve un poco.
En lo que empiece a hervir, baja el fuego y tapa la olla.
Deja cocinar a fuego suave hasta que la carne ablande (1 hora y media aproximadamente).
Revolves occasionally and checks that the liquid has not been dried, if necessary add more stock or water.
After 1 and a half hour, try the meat, if it's already soft add carrots and potatoes. Check his salt and cover again.
If they're ready, your beef stew will be ready.
Apaga el fuego, deja reposar 5 minutos y sirve.

better-than-the-bag-brownie-crisps.name: Better-than-the-bag Brownie Crisps
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line a 13x18-inch baking sheet with parchment paper and lightly grease with nonstick spray.
Place butter and chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl. Heat in 30-second intervals until melted, stirring between each interval. Stir in sugar, vanilla, and espresso. Set aside.
Whisk together flour, cocoa powder, salt, and baking soda in a medium bowl.
Beat egg whites in a large bowl with an electric mixer until frothy, 3 to 4 minutes. Pour in chocolate mixture and beat until combined. Mix in flour mixture until a thick batter forms.

Spread batter onto the prepared baking sheet. Cover with plastic wrap. Place another baking sheet on top and smash it flat to ensure batter is as thin as possible. Remove the top baking sheet, peel off plastic wrap, and sprinkle chocolate chips over batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until crisp, about 25 minutes. Allow brittle to cool on the baking sheet before breaking into pieces.

birria-taco-recipe-lezzet.name: Birria Taco Recipe

ingredients.item: 600 gr dana rib or bird Tags
Reindeed eyebrows or mozzarella, chopped cheek, onion

instructions: 1. Wait for 15 minutes in hot water, remove the stems crack.
2. Onion, garlic, vinegar and peppers from blender to latemake them pure.
3. Take meat into large pot, add sauce, pour water or broth.
4. Cook the cover in 2 hours jealous fire off.
5. Etleri didikleyin.

biscotti.name: Biscotti
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease two cookie sheets or line with parchment paper.
Beat sugar, oil, eggs, and anise extract together in a medium bowl until well-blended. Combine flour and baking powder in a separate bowl; stir into egg mixture to form a heavy dough.
Divide dough into two equal pieces. Form each piece into a log the length of a cookie sheet. Place one log on each of the prepared sheets; and press dough down to 1/2-inch thickness.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes. Transfer logs to wire racks; let sit until cool enough to handle, about 15 minutes.
Slice each log crosswise into about eighteen 1/2-inch-thick slices. Place slices cut-sides up back on the cookie sheets.
Bake until lightly toasted and golden brown, 6 to 10 minutes per side.
Serve and enjoy!

biscuit-apple-cake-recipe-lezzet.name: Biscuit Apple Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 8–10 pcs petiber biscuit(as per set pipe)
2 mins of suffice (about 30 g; nuts or juices can also be replaced)

biscuit-cake-with-cream-teleculinaria.name: Biscuit Cake With Cream
instructions: In a pirex bowl, lay the light and the sugar, take it to the fire, in a sea bath, and tap the mixer until you stop feeling the sugar. Remove from the fire, beat at maximum speed for a few minutes (to cool) then add the butter slowly and finally 2 tablespoons (soup) from the coffee, previously mixed with a few drops of water (until a paste is formed). Beat the cream and wrap it in the cream.

Dissolve the remaining coffee in the water and take it to the microwave at the average power for 1 minute. On a serving plate, place a 20 cm diameter rim and, at the bottom of this one, some cookies previously passed by the coffee. With a spatula, spread a small portion of the cream over it.

Continue to make layers in the same order, until the ingredients are exhausted (the last layer should be cream), and lead to cold for a few hours. Remove the ring from the cake, have some whole biscuits around and sprinkle with some coffee powder. Serve then, very cold, sliced into slices.

bitter-greens-and-avocado-salad.name: Bitter Greens And Avocado Salad
instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Toast sesame seeds on a rimmed baking sheet until fragrant (be careful not to burn), 12–15 minutes. Let cool.
Break nori into small pieces and pulse in spice mill until coarsely ground. Add sesame seeds and salt to spice mill and pulse several times to nick some of the seeds but leaving most of them whole.
Do Ahead: Gomashio can be made 1 month ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 300°. Toast hazelnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until darkened in color and fragrant (insides should be deep golden brown), 20–30 minutes. Let cool slightly, then place nuts in a kitchen towel and rub off skins. Let cool completely; coarsely chop.
Meanwhile, combine hijiki, a large pinch of salt, and ½ cup water in a small bowl. Let sit until hijiki is tender, about 30 minutes; drain.
Whisk vinegar and miso in a large bowl until miso dissolves. Whisk in oil and honey; season dressing with salt. Add escarole and toss to coat; season with more salt. Toss in avocados and watercress.
Divide salad among plates and top with hijiki, hazelnuts, and some of the gomashio.
Do Ahead: Hazelnuts can be toasted 2 weeks ahead; store airtight at room temperature. Dressing can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill.

bitter-greens-with-sweet-mustard-vinaigr.name: Bitter Greens With Sweet Mustard Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: peeled, thinly sliced on a diagonal

instructions: Whisk vinegar, lemon juice, agave, and mustard in a medium bowl. Whisking constantly, slowly stream in oil; whisk until emulsified. Season with salt and pepper.
Toast walnuts in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until slightly darkened, 5–8 minutes. Let cool.

Toss frisée, radicchio, apple, and celery in a large bowl to combine. Season with salt and pepper; squeeze lemon juice over. Toss with enough vinaigrette to lightly coat. Transfer to a platter and top with walnuts.

black-mulberry-cookie-cake-lezzet.name: Black Mulberry Cookie Cake
instructions: 1. Take the flour into a deep mixing container of baking powder, carbonate, salt and sugar.
2. Mix until thoroughly integrates with hand mixer.
3. Add butter and mix again when the mixture comes to fine bread crumb consistency.
4. Finally add the yogurt and pour the dough that you prepared into the baking paper-based oven tray by mixing once again.
5. Place the blacks on the dough slightly pressed and sprinkle the sugar.
6. Bake the cake, which you put in the oven in the pre-heated 180 degrees, for 30-35 minutes, until it is golden yellow.
7. Serve the cookie cake that you remove from the oven after grading.

black-sea-style-anchovy-pilaf-recipe-lez.name: Black Sea Style Anchovy Pilaf Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 kg of fresh raw materials (cleaned, haired and liquefied)
2.5 cup hot water or chicken suy  u
Walnut or nuts can be used. nuts are black sea'eözgüit is a nice adaptive.
Instead of dried blueberry, dry grape or dry plum pieces can be used. a more sour taste can also be preferred for the dry cherry.
A more aromatic taste can be added a small amount of fresh thyme or bay leaf.
A different touch of the battery can be made of for a small amount of pine was roasted instead of peanuts coreless pumpkin.
Aka&ccedil to the juice of the rice; add drip lemon juice relieves the smell of the raw material.

instructions: 1. Wait for 20 minutes in salty, warm water.
2. Leave the starch for a few times wash and wash the filter.
3. Take a pot oil, roast the onions until pink.
4. Add and continue roasting.
5. Pirinci ilave edip 3-4 dakika kavurun.
6. Bird grape, pepper,flower, cinnamon and add salt.
7. Add hot water, cook the water in the jealous fire to attract.
8. Mix dereotu and swimpot in the oven close.
9. Oil a large oven container with butter.
10. Half of cleaned raw materials index the tails up to the bottom of the container.
11. 11. Cover edges too.
12. Posted in internal broadcast in the middle of the battery.
12. August The fragile raw materials are indexed and put the small butter parts.
14 July Ö Bake about 30-35 minutes in the oven 180 degree.
15. From the bakery with lemon slices after 10 minutes of rest and slice.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

blackberry-slushie.name: Blackberry Slushie
instructions: Combine blackberries and orange juice in a blender; blend until smooth.

bloody-hell-bloody-mary.name: Bloody Hell Bloody Mary
instructions: In a large measuring cup or pitcher, combine the Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, horseradish, hot sauce, celery seed, coriander, pepper, and salt. Add the tomato juice and vodka and stir well. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

Prepare 4 (8 ounce) drink glasses by rubbing the rim with a lime wedge and dipping in the Bacon Salt. Fill each glass with plenty of ice and divide the Bloody Mary mixture evenly among the glasses. Garnish each glass with a bacon twist and a lime wedge and serve immediately.

bo-zai-fan-chinese-chicken-and-mushroom-.name: Bo Zai Fan (chinese Chicken And Mushroom Clay Pot Rice)

ingredients.item: . shaoxing wine (chinese rice wine) or dry sherry

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, cut into 1 0.5" pieces

instructions: Whisk together ginger, garlic, both soy sauces, wine, cornstarch, oyster sauce, sugar, and white pepper in a medium bowl. Add chicken pieces and toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours.

If using dried shiitake mushrooms, place in a small bowl and pour in hot water to cover by a few inches (you can use a small plate to help them stay submerged). Let mushrooms soak until caps are tender, at least 20 minutes. Squeeze out excess water with your hands.
Trim any tough stems from dried or fresh mushrooms; discard. Halve caps, or slice if large.

Heat oil in a medium clay pot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add Chinese sausage and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned and crispy, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a plate. (Leave fat in pot for cooking the rice.)

Pour rice into same pot and cook over medium-high heat, stirring to coat in fat, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer, reducing heat to low if you see a lot of steam escaping, 10 minutes.

Remove lid from pot (rice will be only partially cooked) and top rice with marinated chicken along with any marinade, spreading out pieces in an even layer. Add mushrooms and cooked sausage. Cover pot, increase heat to medium, and cook until rice is tender and beginning to turn crispy and smells nutty, 8–10 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low and continue to cook, arranging bok choy on top of rice 3 minutes before removing from heat, 5–7 minutes longer. Remove from heat and let sit (still covered) 10 minutes.
Top chicken and rice with scallions and serve, scraping up some of the crispy rice with each serving.

bogatsa-of-peloponnese-argiro.name: Bogatsa Of Peloponnese
instructions: Mix the water and olive oil in a bass.
Add the sugar and mix well to dissolve.
Mix the flower with salt, soda, cinnamon and clove in a bowl and then gradually add the mixture to the bass with the liquid injectors.
Mix the instrumentals and work the mixture with the hands until we have a universally homogeneous dough.
Transfer to an oiled pan and spread it with our hands to cover the entrance surface of the vehicle.
Using two forks, we shake the surface of the burlap.
We form a cross first and then we make another hit.
Plans diver from bogacha to bogacha.
Bake in a preheated oven at 170
We enjoy it warm and cold.

borscht-braised-beef-short-ribs.name: Borscht-braised Beef Short Ribs

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Generously season short ribs with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper. Heat vegetable oil over high heat in a heavy pot. Brown short ribs on all sides until they are dark brown, about 6 minutes; transfer to a bowl. Add onions and continue cooking over high heat until onions go from golden to dark brown, about 8 minutes; this will make a richer, darker sauce. Stir flour into the onion mixture; cook for about 1 minute. Pour in broth; add bay leaf, beets, carrots, and celery. Bring pot to a simmer. Place browned short ribs in pot, evenly distributing them among the vegetables.
Bake in preheated oven until meat is tender, about 2 hours. Transfer meat and vegetables to a serving platter.
Bring sauce to a fast simmer over high heat until it is reduced by half and slightly thickened, 5 to 10 minutes. Taste for seasoning and add more salt, if needed.
Serve in bowls topped with a dollop of sour cream and chopped fresh chives.

bouche-of-santorini-argiro.name: Bouche Of Santorini

ingredients.item: 1 /2 kg of petti-ber biscuits grated (or grated toast)
1 /2 kg of petti-ber biscuits grated (or grated toast)

instructions: Bake the almonds with the peel or without for a few minutes, about 10 minutes at 200°C.
After they're complete cold, we put them in the blender.
In a bowl, add all the solid iredients.
Almond, sugar, cocoa and grated biscuit.
Mix all the actives together and add the flowerwater a little while by kneading the mixture with your hands until we have a mixture that is made in Troubles.
We make them into small round bites.
Dip the Bouches in crystalline sugar and touch them in caramel paper.
Keep out of the refrigerator for many days.
Thank you very much to the cultural association of Santorini and Rena Fytro for grating the resolution.

braised-cabbage-rice-argiro.name: Braised Cabbage Rice

ingredients.item: 1 small cabbage or half-large coarsely chopped
1 small cabbage or half-large coarsely chopped

instructions: Heat the olive oil first in a pot and sauce the onion, celery and leads.
Add the cars and cut cabbage.
Sauté for a few minutes, until the cabbage volume falls to about half.
Add the tomato paste and rub it well in the pot so that it is cooked for 1 minute.
Then add the chopped tomato and 3 cups of hot water. Boil on medium heat for about 10 minutes.
Then, add the price, salt and pepper. Simmer for 15 minutes until the rice explores and binds the cabbage.
When we put out the fire, the reded cabbage must be quite juacy. If the liquids Evaporate during cooking, fill in some hot water.

In the end, add the Juice from 1 lemon and sprinkle with some olive oil. Cover the pot and allow the vegetarian rice to stand for 10 minutes, so that it draws its liquids. That's why it's important to be kind when we lower the pot from the fire.
Finally, sprinkle with the chopped herbs and serve in deep dishes. We can enjoy it easily or accompany it with some yogurt or feta cheese.

braised-veal-with-bay-leaves-and-mushroo.name: Braised Veal, With Bay Leaves And Mushroom s
braised-veal-with-bay-leaves-and-mushroo.original_name: Μοσχάρι μπρεζέ, με μαυροδάφνη και μανιτάρια

ingredients.item: 2 kg comb from the spala (mouse, round or panties)
2 kg comb from the spala (mouse, round or panties)

instructions: Wash the mushrooms and chop them with a knife. They'll soak later in the beef-beze sauce, giving her amazing aromas.
Tie the meat with string or task to be put into a net to keep its shape and cut nicely after baking.
Heat the oil and brown the meat around for 10′, add the vegetarians and let them spread for a few minutes.
Add the paste and rub it on the base of the pot to bake.
Add the herbs and add the vintage and half the wine.
Allow a few minutes to Evaporate all liquids. We rub her base with a spoon.
When it drinks all its liquids, add the rest of the blackwash and the broth and salt pepper.
Allow to boil and place the pot covered well in the oven.
Bake for 2 hours by turning the meat from time to time in order to Wash from its few liquids and simmer around.
We drill into the center of the meat and if the liquids coming out are transparent, it's ready. Let it stand for 20 minutes.
Remove the meat into a platter and strain the sauce.
Place in a pot and bottle the sauce for a few minutes over high heat until it thinks.
Remove and add the cold butter and mix to melt and polish the sauce.

branzino-with-herbs-and-tomato-jam.name: Branzino With Herbs And Tomato Jam

ingredients.prep: such as nam pla or nuoc nam

instructions: Heat oil in a large sauce- pan over medium heat; add mustard seeds, coriander, and cardamom and cook, stirring often, until mustard seeds begin to pop, about 1 minute. Add shallots, garlic, and ginger and cook, stirring often, until softened, about 5 minutes. Add fish sauce, sugar, turmeric, and red pepper flakes and cook, stirring constantly, until sugar is dissolved, about 1 minute.

Add tomatoes. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring often, until tomatoes are falling apart and mixture thickens, 35–45 minutes. Mix in lime juice; season with salt and pepper. Let cool (you should have about 3 cups).
DO AHEAD: Tomato jam can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 350°. Season fish lightly with salt and pepper. Lay 4 large rectangular pieces of parchment paper on a work surface. Spoon 1/4 cup reserved tomato jam in the center of 1 side of each sheet; top with fish, then another 1/2 cup tomato jam. Fold parchment paper over fish and crimp edges tightly to form a sealed packet. Place packets on 2 large rimmed baking sheets. Bake fish, rotating halfway through, 30 minutes.
Open packets and top fish with herbs.

brazilian-grilled-pineapple.name: Brazilian Grilled Pineapple
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Whisk brown sugar and cinnamon together in a bowl.
Transfer into a large resealable plastic bag. Add pineapple wedges to the bag; shake well to coat each wedge.
Grill pineapple wedges on the preheated grill until heated through, 3 to 5 minutes per side.

bread-lezzet.name: Bread
instructions: 1. Take half pack yeast, sugar and warm water empty and mix.
2. 3-4 minutes to dissolve Yeast.
3. Then add limits and salt to the mixture
4. For all mixing of materials, use wood spoon.
5. The dough kneads until it comes to the consistency that will not be addressed.
6. Then turn off u close your car with stretch and wait for 1 hour.
7. After the passage process finished, pulp a few min morefuck and shape with your hands.
8. Take the dough into a tray with oily paper mass and hold for more than 20 minutes.
9. Finally, take a fre with the help of the blade.
10. If you want, you can also sprinkle the sesame and smash.
11. 11. Take the dough into the oven set to 200 degrees and cook for 30 minutes.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

breakfast-waffle-the-savory-sweetie.name: Breakfast Waffle: The Savory Sweetie
instructions: Preheat a waffle iron to medium-high heat. Grease with nonstick spray.
OPTION 1: If using prepared mix, in a medium bowl, whisk together the waffle mix, milk, egg, and vegetable oil until fully incorporated.

OPTION 2: If making the waffle batter from scratch, in a medium bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.  In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs, melted butter, and buttermilk. Whisk the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until fully combined.
Add 1 cup (130 g) of waffle batter to the center of the waffle iron. Cook until the waffle is golden brown and cooked through, 4–6 minutes. Repeat with the remaining batter.
Top each waffle with 1 tablespoon boysenberry syrup and ½ teaspoon powdered sugar. Garnish with ¼ cup (45 g) mixed berries and 2 tablespoons walnuts.
Enjoy!

broiled-scallops-with-chanterelles.name: Broiled Scallops With Chanterelles
instructions: Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet over medium heat; cook and stir chanterelles in hot butter until tender, 5 to 8 minutes. Transfer chanterelles to a bowl. Melt remaining 7 tablespoons butter in the same skillet and reduce heat to low. Cook butter until it turns pale brown and gives off a nutty fragrance, about 5 minutes.
Stir tomato and balsamic vinegar into browned butter; cook and stir until tomato is soft, about 2 minutes. Stir cooked tomato and browned butter into mushrooms.
Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Place scallops onto a broiler pan and broil in oven until just opaque, about 2 minutes per side. Serve scallops on a platter topped with chanterelles and sauce.

broiler-smores.name: Broiler S'mores
instructions: Preheat the oven broiler. Line a small pan with aluminum foil and lightly coat with cooking spray.
Break the graham crackers in half and lay 4 of the squares out on a serving plate. Break the candy bars in half and lay one piece on each of the graham crackers on the plate.
Arrange the marshmallows in a single layer in the prepared pan.
Broil the marshmallows until the tops brown, turn the marshmallows to brown the undersides. Keep a close eye on the marshmallows so they do not burn. They will brown very quickly.
Remove the marshmallows from the pan and place three on each of the chocolate squares. Top with the remaining graham cracker halves.

brown-butter-and-pistachio-sables.name: Brown Butter And Pistachio Sablés

ingredients.item: Fresh bay leaves or 6 dried bay leaves
Plus 2 tbsp. raw pistachios or any nut
Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Cook butter and bay leaves in a small nonstick skillet over medium-low heat, swirling occasionally, until milk solids are a deep amber color and butter smells very nutty, 6–8 minutes. (Be careful, it may sputter!) Fish out and discard bay leaves. Pour butter into a medium bowl, scraping in any browned bits. Set bowl with butter over a large bowl filled with ice water; let cool, stirring often, until slightly cooler than room temperature (not until hard), 15–20 minutes. (Or chill in fridge about 1 hour.)
Meanwhile, toast ⅓ cup pistachios on a large rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 10–13 minutes. Let cool, then finely chop.

Scrape butter into a large bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat until light beige and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Reduce mixer speed to medium-low; beat in egg yolks and ½ tsp. vanilla, followed by ¾ cup (83 g) powdered sugar, scraping down sides of bowl as needed. Beat in chopped toasted pistachios and ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, then add flour in 2 additions. Beat until dough comes together. (It may look crumbly, but it should hold together when squeezed in your palm.) Transfer dough to a large piece of parchment paper and pat into a loose square. Cover with a second piece of parchment and roll out to a 9" square about ¼" thick. Chill dough 20 minutes.

Uncover dough; cut into 1½"-wide strips. Cut strips at a 45° angle about 1½" apart, creating oblique diamonds. Arrange cookies on 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 1" apart. Bake, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until edges are golden, 14–18 minutes. Let cool.

Finely chop remaining 2 Tbsp. pistachios. Whisk a pinch of salt, remaining 2 cups (220 g) powdered sugar, remaining 1 tsp. vanilla, and 6–8 tsp. water in a small shallow bowl until thick and glossy (not runny, although it should drip off the whisk). Add more water or powdered sugar if needed.

Working one at a time, dip tops of cookies in glaze, letting excess drip back into bowl; smooth with a spoon if needed. Sprinkle with pistachios and let sit 10 minutes to set.
Do ahead: Cookies can be made 3 days ahead. Store air tight at room temperature.

brown-sugarbourbon-ice-cream.name: Brown Sugar–bourbon Ice Cream
instructions: Stir milk, cream, and brown sugar in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat until mixture comes to a rolling boil (it may look curdled, but this is normal).
Meanwhile, whisk yolks, sugar, and salt in a medium bowl until mixture is pale yellow and sugar dissolves.

Place a medium metal bowl in a large bowl of ice water; set a fine-mesh sieve over metal bowl. Whisking yolk mixture constantly, gradually add hot cream mixture (to prevent the eggs in the yolk mixture from scrambling). Return to pan. Stir custard over low heat until thick enough to coat the back of a spoon, about 2 minutes. Immediately strain custard into metal bowl. Let custard cool completely, stirring often.
Stir 1 Tbsp. bourbon and vanilla into custard. Add more bourbon to taste by teaspoonfuls, if desired. DO AHEAD: Custard can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Process custard in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer’s instructions. Transfer ice cream to an airtight container, cover, and freeze. Ice cream can be made 3 days ahead.

brussels-sprouts-with-cheese-sauce.name: Brussels Sprouts With Cheese Sauce
instructions: Place Brussels sprouts into a pot, cover with water, and bring to a boil. Cook until tender yet firm to the bite, about 15 minutes. Drain.

Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat while Brussels sprouts are cooking and cook onion until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Pour in white wine and bring to a boil. Stir in cream, nutmeg, and pepper. Add Edam cheese and stir until melted. Add drained Brussels sprouts and heat in cheese sauce over low heat, about 5 minutes. Season with salt.

buckwheat-and-mushroom-salad.name: Buckwheat And Mushroom Salad
instructions: Heat ⅓ cup oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook buckwheat, stirring often, until slightly darkened in color and fragrant, about 5 minutes; transfer buckwheat and oil to a large bowl.

While the buckwheat cools, cut peels and white pith from lemons; discard. Cut between membranes to release segments onto a cutting board. Squeeze membranes over a small bowl to yield ¼ cup juice; discard membranes. Coarsely chop segments and add to bowl with buckwheat. Add lemon juice, mushrooms, parsley, and half of Gouda and season with salt and pepper; toss to combine. Top with remaining Gouda and drizzle with oil. Grind a little more pepper on top.

buckwheat-or-buckwheat-salad-flavor-and-.name: Buckwheat Or Buckwheat Salad, Flavor And Health In One Dish
buckwheat-or-buckwheat-salad-flavor-and-.original_name: Ensalada de trigo sarraceno o alforfón, sabor y salud en un solo plato

ingredients.item: 1 remolacha grande cocida y cortada en rodajas
1/2 taza de avellanas tostadas y picadas
1 manojo de cilantro fresco, picado finamente

instructions: Cooking the Saracene wheat as indicated in the package. Then scrape and rinse with cold water.
Peel and cut beet into cubes. You can cook her steamed or cook her till she's tender.
In a frying pan with some oil pits mushrooms and beet baked. Salpimenta slightly
Keep the hazelnuts in a frying pan till they are golden and fringe. Then get them rough.
En una ensaladera grande, combina el trigo sarraceno cocido, la remolacha, las avellanas tostadas y el cilantro picado. Agrega sal y pimienta al gusto.
Do your salad with some olive oil and a touch of lemon juice to enhance the flavors.

buffalo-wing-popcorn.name: Buffalo Wing Popcorn
instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Lightly coat parchment and a large bowl with nonstick spray; add popcorn to bowl. Set baking sheet aside.
Bring sugar and ¼ cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Boil, swirling pan occasionally, until caramel is a deep amber color, 10–12 minutes.

Remove from heat; stir in hot sauce and butter (mixture will bubble vigorously). Return to a boil and cook another 3 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in salt, baking soda, and cayenne. Working quickly (and carefully—caramel will be very hot), pour caramel mixture over popcorn and toss to coat.
Spread out popcorn on prepared baking sheet and bake, tossing once, until dry, 15–20 minutes. Let cool.
DO AHEAD: Popcorn can be made 4 hours ahead. Store airtight at room temperature to keep out moisture.

bulgogi-mac-and-cheese.name: Bulgogi Mac And Cheese
instructions: Wrap the steak in plastic wrap and freeze for 2 hours to firm up.
In a large bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, grated pear, brown sugar, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon gochujang until combined.

Using a sharp knife, slice the steak about ¼ inch thick against the grain. Transfer to the bowl with the marinade and stir to coat the meat, then cover with plastic wrap. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or up to overnight, stirring occasionally.

After the meat has marinated, heat the vegetable oil in a large cast iron skillet over high heat until it shimmers. Using tongs, transfer the meat to the pan in a single layer (work in batches, if necessary, to avoid overcrowding) and cook for 2–3 minutes each side, until it reaches your desired internal temperature.
Prepare the Kraft® Deluxe 4-Cheese Mac & Cheese according to the package instructions. Stir in the remaining tablespoon gochujang, adding more to taste if desired.
Plate the mac & cheese on a serving dish and top with the bulgogi meat. Garnish with the green onions and sesame seeds.
Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

bundt-cake-icing-that-doesnt-run.name: Bundt® Cake Icing That Doesn't Run
instructions: Whisk together 2 cups powdered sugar, 2 tablespoons hot water, vegetable oil, and vanilla extract in a large mixing bowl until combined. It should be thick, so add more powdered sugar and hot water as needed to reach a thick consistency.
Transfer icing to a zip-top bag and snip off a large corner of the bag.

Pipe icing slowly around the top of your Bundt® cake. The icing should be pretty stiff as you go around the cake; you can go over the same area of the cake as many times as needed to use all the icing. The icing will very slowly drip down the sides of the cake.

buttermilk-brined-turkey.name: Buttermilk-brined Turkey
instructions: Combine water, salt, parsley, coriander, peppercorns, mustard seeds, garlic powder, and bay leaves in a large stockpot and bring to a boil. Boil until salt has dissolved, about 2 minutes. Let cool for 15 minutes. Stir in buttermilk.
Rinse turkey in cold water. Place in a brining bag and pour buttermilk brine over top. Refrigerate for 24 hours, turning occasionally.
Discard the brine and rinse turkey thoroughly in cold water. Pat turkey dry with paper towels and place breast-side up in a roasting pan. Rub butter over the skin and let sit for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Cook turkey in the preheated oven until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh near the bone reads 74°C (74 degrees C), about 3 hours.
